subject: WM-0126 ready for review
body: Revised WM-0126 as a verified stop-sign evidence artifact: matrix/report preserve Web demo-only, Windows controlled external test, and owner-gated exclusions; quality, ci:local, m5-invariants, and 100000-tick M5 headless remain documented as pass; bench remains FAIL twice with repeated blocking regressions, which now explicitly block M8 closeout and WM-0127 readiness until a dedicated performance repair/explanation task is reviewed.
